classic.notes:
A full touchscreen redesign of Music Boss Classic for Pebble Time 2 and Round 2. Tap, swipe, and flick to control playback over full-screen album art. Three live layouts - Retro+, Modern Classic, and Modern Time - with deep customization from the on-watch menus: text position, multiple fonts and sizes, colours, drop shadow, album-art modes (full / letterbox), scrim, and one-tap presets. Double-press Up/Down to seek; volume ring overlay. Test build - your feedback shapes what ships.

WHAT'S NEW IN 6.134

Touch overlay:
- The Star (special action) button in the touch media overlay now works - it fires your per-app special action, exactly like the Star on the button-controlled action bar. Previously the overlay Star did nothing.

WHAT'S NEW IN 6.133

Album art:
- Sharper reduced-colour album art for detailed covers - when a cover is too big for full colour, the fallback now picks 16 colours tuned to that specific image (rich purples, teals, skin tones) instead of a fixed set. Delivered with the latest phone app.

WHAT'S NEW IN 6.131

Retro+:
- The General > Text Colour setting (Auto / White / Black) now themes the WHOLE Retro+ screen - the text, progress bar, the volume / headphone + note icons, and the clock all follow it together.

Progress bar:
- Clearer fill: the unfilled part now uses a contrasting grey so played-vs-remaining reads distinctly over both light and dark album art.

Text scrolling:
- The Scroll Text action now reveals your Timed text AND scrolls it in one press - handy for long titles with a long timed timeout.

Upgrading:
- Coming from an older non-touch build, your Classic / Classic Idle Art / Art Only screen choice now carries over to the matching Modern layout automatically.

browser.notes: The Media Browser is now fully touch-enabled on Pebble Time 2 and Round 2 - every menu is tap and scroll navigable.
